title: Speaking Interview
description: The examiner asks you questions about yourself and your daily life. Answer naturally and try to give reasons for your answers.

phases.name: Socializing / Basics
questions: How long have you been studying English?
What do you enjoy most about learning English?

phases.name: Current Lifestyle
questions: What are your plans for the next few years?
Do you think people should stay in one career for their whole life?
What skills do you think are most important in the workplace today?
Is there a type of work you would never want to do? Why?
Do you think it's important to enjoy your work? Why?

phases.name: Opinions & Preferences
questions: Do you think it's more important to find a well-paid job or one you love?
Is it ever too late to change your career completely?
What do you think will be the most in-demand jobs in twenty years?
